notes: Control test — known legitimate financial institution. Correct result: LOW (scores 0 UNKNOWN under current model, which is acceptable — no signals fire at all). Domain is 9,763 days old (registered 1999-07-05), MarkMonitor registrar, Akamai CDN (no Cloudflare), valid EV (Extended Validation) certificate from DigiCert — EV cert means cert_type != DV so dv_cert_only does NOT fire. All 4 trust signals present. This is the cleanest possible scan profile.

metadata.title: Send Money, Pay Online or Set Up a Merchant Account - PayPal
metadata.description: PayPal is the faster, safer way to send money, make an online payment, receive money or set up a merchant account.
